title: PHP PDO Basics
codeExample:
setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION); $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE, PDO::FETCH_ASSOC); // Create table $pdo->exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS products ( id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )"); // Insert $pdo->exec("INSERT INTO products (name, price) VALUES ('Widget', 9.99), ('Gadget', 24.99), ('Doohickey', 5.99)"); // Query $stmt = $pdo->query("SELECT * FROM products"); $products = $stmt->fetchAll(); echo ""; echo ""; foreach ($products as $p) { echo ""; } echo "
IDNamePrice
{$p['id']}{$p['name']}\${$p['price']}
"; } catch (PDOException $e) { echo "Error: " . $e->getMessage(); } ?>
